parameters.name: cropleft
parameters.label: Crop Left
parameters.description: Positions the left edge of the image.

parameters.name: cropright
parameters.label: Crop Right
parameters.description: Positions the right edge of the image.

parameters.name: cropbottom
parameters.label: Crop Bottom
parameters.description: Positions the bottom edge of the image.

parameters.name: croptop
parameters.label: Crop Top
parameters.description: Positions the top edge of the image.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the tiles.

parameters.name: flop
parameters.label: Transpose
parameters.description: Similar to performing a flop on the image (See ) without changing the resolution. It swaps the position of the bottom-right corner with the upper-left corner, while maintaining the original resolution

parameters.name: repeatx
parameters.label: Repeat X
parameters.description: Number of tiles in X direction.

parameters.name: repeaty
parameters.label: Repeat Y
parameters.description: Number of tiles in Y direction.

parameters.name: reflectx
parameters.label: Reflect X
parameters.description: Reflects the tiles in X. Must have Tile Y set to 2.

parameters.name: reflecty
parameters.label: Reflect Y
parameters.description: Reflects the tiles in Y. Must have Tile X set to 2.

parameters.name: overlapu
parameters.label: Overlap U
parameters.description: Blends the edges together on the right and left edges of the tiles.

parameters.name: overlapv
parameters.label: Overlap V
parameters.description: Blends the edges together on the bottom and top edges of the tiles.
